title: Necessities
description: Essentials like teleportation, time, weather, nicknames, and more for better server management.
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Promotion Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/ee9630c7-c981-45f9-9862-3a1d71a628bf.webp)](https://redirect.daqem.com?to=https%3A%2F%2Fbisecthosting.com%2FDAQEM%3Fr%3DNecessitiesModrinth) [![Ko-fi Promotion Banner](https://i.imgur.com/SU7HhbO.png)](https://ko-fi.com/daqem)
**Necessities** is a versatile Minecraft mod that adds **essential tools and commands** for server management and player convenience. Whether you’re running a small private server or managing a large community, this mod makes it easy to maintain order and enhance gameplay. --- ## 🔑 Key Features 🚀 **Teleportation Commands:** Set homes, create warps, teleport players, and more. 💬 **Chat Tools:** Private messaging with reply, broadcasts, and customizable chat prefix. 🌍 **World Control:** Change weather, time, and manage regions effortlessly. ## 🔼 Why Use Necessities? ⚙️ **Easy to Configure:** Fully customizable settings through an ingame config menu. _(F12)_ 🪶 **Lightweight and Efficient:** Designed to work with minimal performance impact. 💖 **Compatible:** Works with NeoForge and Fabric. ## ⁉️ Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ) **Q: What Minecraft versions does Necessities support?** **A:** Necessities supports Minecraft versions 1.21 and above. **Q: Can I disable certain features?** **A:** Yes, all features can be toggled on or off in the config file. **Q: Does it work in single-player?** **A:** Yes, but most features are designed for multiplayer use. **Q: Is Necessities compatible with modded servers?** **A:** Absolutely! It works alongside other Forge and Fabric mods. **Q: How can I report issues or request new features?** **A:** Visit the official GitHub repository or our community Discord for support. ## Commands ### **Teleportation Commands** **`/home [name]`**: Teleports you to your set home location. **`/sethome [name]`**: Sets a home location with an optional name. **`/delhome [name]`**: Deletes a specified home location. **`/spawn`**: Teleports you to the server’s spawn point. **`/setspawn`**: Sets the server’s spawn point to your current location. **`/warp [name]`**: Teleports you to a pre-set warp point. **`/setwarp [name]`**: Creates a warp point at your current location. **`/delwarp [name]`**: Deletes a specified warp point. **`/tpa [player]`**: Sends a teleport request to another player. **`/tpahere [player]`**: Requests another player to teleport to you. **`/tpaccept`**: Accepts a pending teleport request. **`/tpadeny`**: Denies a pending teleport request. **`/tpatoggle`**: Toggles whether other players can send you teleport requests. **`/back`**: Teleports you to your last location before death or teleportation. ### **World Management Commands** **`/day`**: Quickly sets the time to day. **`/night`**: Quickly sets the time to night. **`/noon`**: Quickly sets the time to noon. **`/midnight`**: Quickly sets the time to midnight. **`/sun`**: Quickly sets the weather to clear. **`/rain`**: Quickly sets the weather to rain. **`/thunder`**: Quickly sets the weather to thunderstorms. ### **Chat Commands** **`/msg [player] [message]`**: Sends a private message to a player. **`/r [message]`**: Replies to the last private message you received. **`/broadcast [message]`**: Sends a message to all players with a special highlight. **`/nick [name]`**: Sets a custom nickname for yourself. **`/delnick`**: Removes your custom nickname. ### **Player Commands** **`/afk`**: Marks you as away from keyboard (AFK). **`/god [player]`**: Toggles invincibility for yourself or another player. **`/gm [mode]`**: Changes your game mode (e.g., survival, creative).
